summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of PS Collectors Hub (PS Shelf). Backend API fully functional (31/31 endpoints passing). Frontend UI tested across all 12 pages with 11/11 major user flows working. Critical requirement verified: new user library starts empty. IGDB integration working correctly. Minor HTML validation issue found in Collection page.

ui_bugs.issue: HTML validation error: <span> cannot be child of <option> in sort dropdown
ui_bugs.impact: Causes hydration warning but doesn't break functionality

passed_tests: Backend: User signup with empty library (total_games=0) - CRITICAL REQUIREMENT ✅
Backend: IGDB platforms list (all 7 PS platforms)
Backend: IGDB search (God of War query returns results)
Frontend: New user signup flow with empty library and welcome toast
Frontend: Dashboard with empty state indicators
Frontend: Search page with IGDB integration (~3s response time)
Frontend: Search filters (platform, sort, load more)
Frontend: Game cards display (cover, year, rating, platform badges)
Frontend: Game detail page (cover, info, screenshots, similar games, buttons)
Frontend: Collection page with empty state
Frontend: Explore page with collectors grid
Frontend: Settings page with 4 tabs (Profile, Account, Privacy, Danger Zone)
Frontend: Settings profile fields (display_name, username, bio, favourite_platform)
Frontend: Public profile page with Collection/Stats tabs
Frontend: All 12 pages accessible and functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor HTML validation error in Collection.jsx line 130 (span inside option element). All critical functionality working correctly.

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (11/11 major flows working, 1 minor HTML validation issue)
